en: Don't give me that. You've been smooching with everybody.
ko: 당신이 잘못 알고 계신 것 같아요, 선생님.

en: Snuffy, Al, Leo, Little Mo with the gimpy leg,
I could go on forever, baby.
I'm terribly sorry, sir, but I'm afraid you're mistaken.
We are looking for a young man. All right. I believe you.
But my tommy gun don't. Get down on your knees and tell me you love me.
You gotta do better than that.
ko: 알겠어요. 당신은 그보다 더 나은 사람이에요.
